meta.notes: Mexico CFE 'Doméstico' (tariff 1) is a stepped slab: básico / intermedio / excedente at rising rates (the high-consumption DAC tariff is separate). Block tiers are a v1.1 schema feature — modelled here as the básico step. Rate APPROXIMATE (~2026) in MXN/kWh — verify with CFE. Excludes the fixed charge. National (non-DAC, temperate region).
